SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm

Class VMTacletMatcher

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.VMTacletMatcher
All Implemented Interfaces:
TacletMatcher
public class VMTacletMatcher extends Object implements TacletMatcher

Matching algorithm using a virtual machine based approach inspired by Voronkonv et al. It matches exactly one taclet and does not produce code trees.

Instances of this class should not be created directly, use TacletMatcherKit.createTacletMatcher(Taclet) instead.

See Also:
  • TacletMatcherKit

    matchAssumes(@NonNull Iterable<AssumesFormulaInstantiation> p_toMatch, @NonNull MatchResultInfo p_matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices p_services)
    Matches a list of formula instantiations against the full "assumes" sequent of a taclet, starting with the given initial match conditions.

  • Constructor Details

    • VMTacletMatcher

      public VMTacletMatcher(Taclet taclet)
      Parameters:
      taclet - the Taclet matched by this matcher

  • Method Details

    • matchAssumes

      public final @NonNull AssumesMatchResult matchAssumes(@NonNull Iterable<@NonNull AssumesFormulaInstantiation> p_toMatch, @NonNull Term p_template, @NonNull MatchResultInfo p_matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices p_services)
      (non-Javadoc)
      Specified by:
      matchAssumes in interface TacletMatcher
      Parameters:
      p_toMatch - a list of formulas to attempt matching with template
      p_template - the formula template to match against each formula in toMatch
      p_matchCond - the current MatchResultInfo representing the current match status
      p_services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      a result containing the successfully matched formulas and their associated match conditions
      See Also:
      • TacletMatcher.matchAssumes(Iterable, org.key_project.logic.Term, MatchResultInfo, LogicServices)

    • matchAssumes

      public final @Nullable MatchResultInfo matchAssumes(@NonNull Iterable<AssumesFormulaInstantiation> p_toMatch, @NonNull MatchResultInfo p_matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices p_services)
      Description copied from interface: TacletMatcher
      Matches a list of formula instantiations against the full "assumes" sequent of a taclet, starting with the given initial match conditions.

      Precondition: toMatch.size() == ifSequent().size()

      Specified by:
      matchAssumes in interface TacletMatcher
      Parameters:
      p_toMatch - a list of formulas to attempt matching with template
      p_matchCond - the current MatchResultInfo representing the current match status
      p_services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      the resulting match conditions if successful; null otherwise
      See Also:
      • TacletMatcher.matchAssumes(Iterable, MatchResultInfo, LogicServices)

    • checkConditions

      public final @Nullable MatchResultInfo checkConditions(@Nullable MatchResultInfo cond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
      Checks the given match result against the taclet's variable conditions.

      Returns an updated match result if all conditions are satisfied. If not, or if matchResultInfo is null, the method returns null.

      Specified by:
      checkConditions in interface TacletMatcher
      Parameters:
      cond - the match result to validate
      services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      the validated and potentially updated match result, or null if validation fails

    • checkVariableConditions

      public final @Nullable MatchResultInfo checkVariableConditions(@Nullable SchemaVariable var, @Nullable SyntaxElement instantiationCandidate, @Nullable MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
      Checks whether a schema variable can be instantiated with the given candidate term, under the provided match conditions.
      Specified by:
      checkVariableConditions in interface TacletMatcher
      Parameters:
      var - the SchemaVariable to instantiate
      instantiationCandidate - the candidate instantiation for var
      matchCond - the current MatchResultInfo representing the current match status
      services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      the updated match result if instantiation is valid, or null otherwise

    • matchFind

      public final @Nullable MatchResultInfo matchFind(@NonNull Term term, @NonNull MatchResultInfo p_matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
      Attempts to match the given term against the taclet's "find" term.

      If the taclet has no "find" term, or if matching fails, this method returns null.

      Specified by:
      matchFind in interface TacletMatcher
      Parameters:
      term - the Term to be matched against the taclet's "find" expression
      p_matchCond - the current MatchResultInfo including partial instantiations
      services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      the updated match result (possibly with added schema variable instantiations) on success, or null if no match is found

    • matchSV

      public @Nullable MatchResultInfo matchSV(@NonNull SchemaVariable sv, @NonNull SyntaxElement syntaxElement, @NonNull MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
      Matches a schema variable to a syntax element under the given match conditions.
      Specified by:
      matchSV in interface TacletMatcher
      Parameters:
      sv - the SchemaVariable to match
      syntaxElement - the candidate SyntaxElement
      matchCond - the current MatchResultInfo representing the current match status
      services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      updated match result if successful; null if no match was possible
